rules.name: BP_AutoFill_Address
rules.description: When changing business partner, auto-fill partner address, payment terms, payment method and price list from vendor defaults

rules.name: Line_Recalc_Totals
rules.description: After saving a line, recalculate header totals (TotalLines, GrandTotal) including taxes

rules.name: Product_AutoFill_Price
rules.description: When selecting a product, auto-fill unit price, tax and UOM from the purchase price list

rules.name: Line_Calc_NetAmount
rules.description: Recalculate line net amount and tax amount when quantity, price or discount changes

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when invoice status is Completed or Voided

rules.name: Match_PO_Receipt
rules.description: When a line references an order line or receipt line (M_InOutLine_ID, C_OrderLine_ID), validate quantity does not exceed outstanding amount from the linked document

rules.name: DateAcct_Default
rules.description: When dateInvoiced changes, auto-fill dateAcct with the same value unless manually overridden

rules.name: Currency_From_PriceList
rules.description: When price list changes, auto-fill currency from the selected price list
